title: Charred American Meat Grill
description: A hearty charred meat dish featuring pressure-cooked sauerkraut and a low-sodium approach.
instructions: Season the flank steak with salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika.
Grill the steak for 5 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the steak to a cutting board and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook the sliced onion and bell pepper on the grill for 5 minutes, or until they're tender.
Add the sauerkraut to a pressure cooker and cook for 5 minutes, or until it's heated through.
Slice the grilled steak against the grain and serve with the cooked sauerkraut, onion, and bell pepper.
Garnish with fresh thyme and serve immediately.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as roasted vegetables or a salad.
Enjoy your delicious Charred American Meat Grill!
